section.title: Instructor Signature
section.lockedBanner: This flight is locked by an instructor signature and can't be edited.
section.voidDialogDescription: This unlocks the flight for editing. A new signature will be required afterwards.
section.voidReasonPlaceholder: e.g. correcting a data entry error
section.pendingNotSent: Not sent yet — send when ready or share the link below
section.resendConfirmDescription: The instructor will no longer be able to sign using the link already sent to them.
section.noSignature: This flight hasn't been signed yet.

liveDialog.title: Sign this flight
liveDialog.description: Have the instructor draw their signature below.
liveDialog.signatureRequired: Please draw a signature before submitting.

emailDialog.title: Request signature by email
emailDialog.description: Enter the instructor's email to send a signing link now, or leave it blank to send later.

linkDialog.title: Shareable signing link
linkDialog.description: Share this link or QR code with the instructor. Anyone with the link can sign this flight until it expires.

publicPage.title: Sign Logbook Entry
publicPage.invalidDescription: This signing link is invalid or has already been used.
publicPage.expiredDescription: This signing link has expired. Ask the pilot to send you a new one.
publicPage.successDescription: Thank you! You can now close this page.
publicPage.signatureRequired: Please draw a signature before submitting.
